name: The Velocity
effect: Declare organizational velocity. This card is considered accelerating.

clauses.name: MOMENTUM CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a meeting references velocity: Add one velocity token regardless of output.

clauses.name: MEASUREMENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If velocity is questioned: Replace with a chart depicting velocity.

clauses.name: FRICTION EFFECT
clauses.rule: When a new governance process is introduced: Velocity is maintained in name only.

witness_quote: We need to move faster on this.
